rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid component type scopes for port references in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid subcomponent port references in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use eq for range comparisons to ensure type consistency
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Place implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections in implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use the recommended pattern for range comparisons: eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
